captain_rankings.recommendation: CAPTAIN - season cum_pts leader and nailed premium (APEX-locked signal). Wins MC on median, floor and ceiling. Minor 7% rotation risk if title already secured, but still the proven-best owned asset with Haaland unavailable.

VICE - WHU vs Leeds relegation decider lifts motivation/ceiling, but lower team quality drags floor and median below Salah on every MC metric. The motivation/matchup narrative is exactly the short-term signal the holdout proved weaker than cum_pts. Demote from C to VC.

notes: xpts.json zeroed (all 0 except Sels=1) - manual estimates used per confirmed player status. 50k-run Monte Carlo: Salah captain_median 16.3 vs Bowen 12.3, Salah cap_mean 16.09 vs 12.71. Recommendation flips current squad C/VC (squad has Bowen C / Salah VC) to align with APEX-locked rule: captain = season cum_pts leader (nailed premium, not matchup/motivation). Salah is the proven-best owned asset with Haaland UNAVAILABLE and Gabriel doubtful. Starters Gvardiol (benched), Rogers (75%), Aina/Anderson/Wood (~80%) carry minutes risk but are not captain candidates.
